name: Town of hypnosis
description:
A totally normal town...

Warning

Contains heavy non-con.

Things to note:

  • This is Your thoughts, This is the hypnosis. You don't have to obey the hypnosis but all my example dialogue will have {{user}} submitting. Plus do not use '*' and '**' in another context when responding as the bot may get confused.

  • Use a persona, it will greatly improve your experience.

  • Use chat memory to record what hypnosis you are currently under.
